from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Any

@dataclass
class ServiceClient:
    api_key: str
    connection: Any = None
    
    @classmethod
    def create_and_connect(cls, api_key: str):
        # Correct: use explicit factory classmethods to handle heavy initialization and side-effects
        client = cls(api_key=api_key)
        client.connection = establish_network_connection(api_key)
        return client
